meaning: n.附件,零件,附加物,从犯,同谋者adj.附属的,补充的,同谋的,副的
examples: He was charged with being an accessory to murder.
The company serves the national automotive aftermarket with a broad range of accessory and recreational-vehicle products.
For this reason, the watch industry has become an accessory business in recent years.
Instead of a crew-neck tee, reach for a clean-cut accessory in a chalky shade.
Her eponymous clothing and accessory line is synonymous with fashionistas of all ages and backgrounds.
